item.title: Mazamorra: A sweet traditional corn dessert from Paraguay
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: Mazamorra is a classic Paraguayan corn-based dessert. Simple, filling, and deeply rooted in the country’s regional food culture.

item.title: Chipa Guasu: Paraguay’s moist corn cake with cheese
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: Chipa Guasú is more than just a side dish - it’s a piece of Paraguayan lifestyle. Learn all about this traditional corn cake and how to make it easily at home.
